summary: Iteration 15 - Hytale Modding API Alignment Testing Complete. All new features verified: Cave system with 6 cave types, Zone Discovery Config, JAR export v2.0 with Hytale-accurate Java code, map layer toggles for caves and borders.
passed_tests: Login works with admin@hytorbis.com / Lucky420420$
World loads and displays correctly
Map shows 'Caves' toggle button in top-right (data-testid='toggle-caves')
Map shows 'Borders' toggle button in top-right (data-testid='toggle-borders')
Cave legend section appears in bottom legend bar with all 6 cave types (Natural Cave, Crystal Cavern, Lava Tube, Ice Cave, Corrupted Depths, Flooded Grotto)
Zone properties panel shows Cave System section (data-testid='cave-config-panel') when zone selected
Zone properties panel shows Zone Discovery section (data-testid='discovery-config-panel') when zone selected
Cave config has '+ Add cave type' dropdown to add cave types
Discovery config has Display Name input (data-testid='discovery-display-name')
Discovery config has Sound Event input
Discovery config has Show Notification checkbox
Discovery config has Major Zone checkbox
Discovery config has Fade In slider
Discovery config has Fade Out slider
Discovery config has Duration slider
Discovery config has Border Fade slider
JAR export endpoint returns version 2.0
JAR export contains README.md with installation instructions
JAR export contains mod.json with worldgen systems: zones, biomes, caves
JAR export contains placement.json with zonePlacements and structurePlacements
JAR export Java code contains Zone, BiomePatternGenerator, CaveGenerator, ZoneDiscoveryConfig classes
Backend models accept caves field in ZoneConfig
Backend models accept discovery field in ZoneConfig
Config.js exports CAVE_TYPES with 6 cave types
Config.js exports ZONE_DEFAULT_CAVES per zone type
Config.js exports ZONE_DISCOVERY_DEFAULTS per zone type
critical_code_review_comments: Cave system implementation is complete with 6 cave types: natural, crystal, lava, ice, corrupted, flooded
Each cave type has configurable density, min_depth, max_depth, and biome_mask
Zone Discovery Config matches Hytale's ZoneDiscoveryConfig with all required fields
JAR export generates proper Java code using Hytale Server Plugin API classes
Border transitions visualization implemented with opacity gradients at zone edges
Map layer toggles allow showing/hiding caves and borders independently
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing Test World for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 tested the Hytale modding API alignment features. The app now supports: (1) Cave system with 6 cave types (natural, crystal, lava, ice, corrupted, flooded) configurable per-zone with density, depth range, and biome masks. (2) Zone Discovery Config matching Hytale's ZoneDiscoveryConfig with display name, sound event, notification settings, and fade timings. (3) JAR export v2.0 generating real Java code using Zone, BiomePatternGenerator, CaveGenerator, ZoneDiscoveryConfig classes. (4) Border transitions visualization between zones. (5) Map layer toggles for caves and borders. All APIs verified working. Frontend components: CaveConfigPanel and DiscoveryConfigPanel in MapArea.jsx. Backend models: CaveConfig and ZoneDiscoveryConfig in models.py. JAR export in worlds.py line ~497.
